CP14BaseKeyRing.name: кольцо для ключей
CP14BaseKeyRing.desc: Позволяет комфортно хранить большое количество ключей в одном месте.

CP14BaseKey.name: ключ
CP14BaseKey.desc: Небольшая заковыристая железяка, открывающая определенные замки. Не отдавайте кому попало!

CP14BaseLockpick.name: отмычка
CP14BaseLockpick.desc: Воровской инструмент, при должном умении и сноровке позволяющий взламывать любые замки.

CP14BaseLock.name: стальной замок
CP14BaseLock.desc: Он запирает вещи. И вам потребуется ключ, чтобы открыть их обратно.

CP14ClothingCloakArmoredRed.name: armored red cape
CP14ClothingCloakArmoredRed.desc: Huge metal shoulder pads give extra protection from getting your head chopped off.

CP14ClothingCloakBlacksmithArpon.name: blacksmith's apron
CP14ClothingCloakBlacksmithArpon.desc: Loose leather strips, still actually being clothing.

CP14ClothingCloakSimpleWhite.name: white cloak
CP14ClothingCloakSimpleWhite.desc: Long coat with a high collar.

CP14ClothingCloakSimpleDarkBlue.name: dark cloak
CP14ClothingCloakSimpleDarkBlue.desc: Long coat with a high collar.

CP14ClothingEyesAlchemyGlasses.name: alchemy glasses
CP14ClothingEyesAlchemyGlasses.desc: Special magic infused glasses that allow you to clearly see the composition of any mixtures.

CP14ClothingEyesAlchemyMonocle.name: alchemy monocle
CP14ClothingEyesAlchemyMonocle.desc: Special magic infused monocle that allow you to clearly see the composition of any mixtures.

CP14ClothingEyesThaumaturgyGlasses.name: thaumaturgy glasses
CP14ClothingEyesThaumaturgyGlasses.desc: Goggles that allow you to scan magical items and creatures to clearly see the amount of energy left in them.

CP14ClothingHeadMetalHeadband.name: metall headband
CP14ClothingHeadMetalHeadband.desc: The odds of it protecting you from a head shot are slim to none.

CP14ClothingHeadTriangularHat.name: triangular hat
CP14ClothingHeadTriangularHat.desc: a big, pointy hat for those who like to look smart.

CP14ClothingHeadTriangularHatGolden.name: golden triangular hat
CP14ClothingHeadTriangularHatGolden.desc: a big, pointy hat for those who like to look smart. Decorated with a gold hoop.

CP14ClothingMaskSinner.name: Sinner's Mask
CP14ClothingMaskSinner.desc: A mask intented to be worn by not the brightest individuals. Executioners put them on themselves and the victim before execution.

CP14ClothingPantsTrouserWhite.name: white trouser
CP14ClothingPantsTrouserWhite.desc: Wide, loose pants made of plain canvas cloth.

CP14ClothingPantsTrouserDarkBlue.name: dark trouser
CP14ClothingPantsTrouserDarkBlue.desc: Wide, loose pants made of plain canvas cloth.

CP14ClothingPantsAristocratic.name: aristocrat's pants
CP14ClothingPantsAristocratic.desc: Pants with enough quality fabric that you don't want to cave in them.

CP14ClothingPantsLoincloth.name: loincloth
CP14ClothingPantsLoincloth.desc: Free, spacious, nothing gets in the way, and it also looks extremely rugged

CP14ClothingShirtCottonBlue.name: cotton blue shirt
CP14ClothingShirtCottonBlue.desc: Pleasant to the touch material, in a comfortable loose shirt shape.

CP14ClothingShirtCottonBlueDark.name: cotton dark shirt
CP14ClothingShirtCottonBlueDark.desc: Pleasant to the touch material, in a comfortable loose shirt shape.

CP14ClothingShirtCottonPurple.name: cotton purple shirt
CP14ClothingShirtCottonPurple.desc: Pleasant to the touch material, in a comfortable loose shirt shape.

CP14ClothingShirtCottonRed.name: cotton red shirt
CP14ClothingShirtCottonRed.desc: Pleasant to the touch material, in a comfortable loose shirt shape.

CP14ClothingShirtCottonWhite.name: cotton white shirt
CP14ClothingShirtCottonWhite.desc: Pleasant to the touch material, in a comfortable loose shirt shape.

CP14ClothingShirtCottonYellow.name: cotton yellow shirt
CP14ClothingShirtCottonYellow.desc: Pleasant to the touch material, in a comfortable loose shirt shape.

CP14ClothingShirtSteampunk.name: brass reinforced shirt
CP14ClothingShirtSteampunk.desc: A white shirt with brass inserts

CP14ClothingShoesBlack.name: simple black boots
CP14ClothingShoesBlack.desc: They won't hold moisture, but it's better than going barefoot.

CP14ClothingShoesAristocraticBlack.name: aristocratic black boots
CP14ClothingShoesAristocraticBlack.desc: They're expensive enough that you don't want to go caving in them.

CP14ClothingShoesSandals.name: sandals
CP14ClothingShoesSandals.desc: Sandals made of rough leather and metal fastenings

CP14OreCopper.name: copper piece
CP14OreCopper.desc: A piece of pale, heavy copper.

CP14OreIron.name: iron piece
CP14OreIron.desc: A piece of cold, heavy iron.

CP14OreSilver.name: silver piece
CP14OreSilver.desc: A piece of shiny, warm silver.

CP14OreGold.name: gold piece
CP14OreGold.desc: A piece of soft, pure gold.

CP14CopperCoin.name: copper crown
CP14CopperCoin.desc: The minimum unit of currency in the world of Eberron. One tenth of a silver sovereign.

CP14SilverCoin.name: silver sovereign
CP14SilverCoin.desc: Equivalent to 10 copper crowns, and is 1 tenth of a gold galifar.

CP14GoldCoin.name: gold galifar
CP14GoldCoin.desc: Equivalent to 10 silver sovereign, and is 1 tenth of a platinum coin.

CP14PlatinumCoin.name: platinum dragon
CP14PlatinumCoin.desc: Equivalent to 10 gold galifar, and is the most expensive coin in Eberron's world.

CP14Wallet.name: wallet
CP14Wallet.desc: A small wallet, handy for storing coins.

CP14DirtBlock1.name: dirt block
CP14DirtBlock1.desc: A block of excellent black soil.

CP14WoodLog.name: wooden log
CP14WoodLog.desc: A piece of unprocessed wood. Good material for building, or starting a fire.

CP14Nail1.name: nails
CP14Nail1.desc: A basic carpenter's tool that allows you to do unimaginable things with wood.

CP14BloodGrass.name: bloodgrass
CP14BloodGrass.desc: The dullest and most common plant to be found in the wild is the dark brown grass. Known for its nutritional properties.

CP14AgaricMushroom.name: fly agaric
CP14AgaricMushroom.desc: This poisonous mushroom can often be found near bodies of water or other wet areas. It is not recommended for consumption.

CP14ChromiumSlime.name: chromium slime
CP14ChromiumSlime.desc: This rare thick substance can be found in a stream of water as if it has a mind of its own. When trying to change the slime itself - the slime changes the reagent it interacts with.

CP14WildSage.name: wild sage root
CP14WildSage.desc: Root of a ubiquitous medicinal plant, not bad at healing physical injuries, and inducing coughing.

CP14QuartzShard.name: rough quartz
CP14QuartzShard.desc: a natural crystal that is a natural storage of magical energy. Its color reflects the quality of the crystal - the higher the emission spectrum, the higher the level of energy leakage.

CP14LumiMushroom.name: lumishroom
CP14LumiMushroom.desc: A faintly luminous mushroom. Often used by alchemists as a means of concentrating solutions.

CP14Cauldron.name: cauldron
CP14Cauldron.desc: A heavy cauldron. It is not as bulky as a vat, but can be carried in your hands.

CP14Pestle.name: pestle
CP14Pestle.desc: A device for conveniently grinding various materials into liquid

CP14Mortar.name: mortar
CP14Mortar.desc: Alchemical sturdy plate for grinding reagents

CP14Dropper.name: dropper
CP14Dropper.desc: Small dropper for managing very small values of liquids

CP14VialTiny.name: tiny vial
CP14VialTiny.desc: A sturdy glass vial to hold a tiny amount of liquid.

CP14VialSmall.name: small vial
CP14VialSmall.desc: A fragile glass vial to hold a small amount of liquid.

CP14EnergyCrystalBase.desc: Processed quartz crystals are excellent repositories of magical energy. And special connectors allow you to conveniently insert them into magical devices, turning them into energy batteries.

CP14OldLantern.name: Old lantern
CP14OldLantern.desc: Relic of the Techomagic's past. Large, weighty, unpractical. At least feels good to crack some skulls with it.

CP14BaseSharpeningStone.name: sharpening stone
CP14BaseSharpeningStone.desc: Allows you to sharpen blunted weapons. If you overdo it, you may well sharpen the weapon completely.

CP14Shovel.name: shovel
CP14Shovel.desc: An implement for digging up earth, digging beds or graves.

CP14BaseDagger.name: dagger
CP14BaseDagger.desc: A small, multi-purpose, sharp blade. You can cut meat or throw it at a goblin.

CP14BaseHandheldAxe.name: hand axe
CP14BaseHandheldAxe.desc: A small axe, great for chopping wood or sinew.

CP14BaseLightHammer.name: light hammer
CP14BaseLightHammer.desc: A small hammer. Good for carpentry work as well as for cracking skulls.

CP14BaseMace.name: mace
CP14BaseMace.desc: A heavy piece of metal on a long stick. What could be simpler than that?

CP14BaseSickle.name: sickle
CP14BaseSickle.desc: Originally developed as a weapon against grass, the sickle suddenly proved itself good at the bloodier harvest as well.

CP14BaseThrowableSpear.name: throwing javelin
CP14BaseThrowableSpear.desc: A weapon that has done its duty since the age of the giants.

CP14BaseTwoHandedSword.name: two-handed sword
CP14BaseTwoHandedSword.desc: A powerful weapon that requires tremendous strength and skill to use effectively.

CP14WeaponRevolverNavy.name: navy revolver
CP14WeaponRevolverNavy.desc: A weighty Marin revolver. The Marin revolvers nowadays cost fabulous sums of money, and can be afforded only by successful sailors and merchants.

CP14BaseLightCrossbow.name: light crossbow
CP14BaseLightCrossbow.desc: A small, compact crossbow that is comfortable to hold with one hand. Not too accurate on the reverse side.

CP14WeaponRifleCrush.name: crush
CP14WeaponRifleCrush.desc: Lightweight, expensive, and not an easy rifle to use.

CP14WeaponRifleDurandal.name: durandal
CP14WeaponRifleDurandal.desc: A medium sized, expensive and not user friendly rifle.

CP14WeaponRifleLebel.name: lebel
CP14WeaponRifleLebel.desc: Heavy, expensive and not a comfortable rifle to use.

CP14Crossbolt.name: crossbow bolt
CP14Crossbolt.desc: Rod with a sharpened spike. No plumage, they're not bows.

CP14DungeonEntrance.name: dungeon entrance
CP14DungeonEntrance.desc: The dark depths of the underworld are calling you.

CP14DungeonExit.name: dungeon exit
CP14DungeonExit.desc: A way out of the dark underworld into the overworld.

CP14BaseSharpeningStoneStructure.name: stationary sharpening stone
CP14BaseSharpeningStoneStructure.desc: A strong, durable sharpening stone capable of sharpening weapons without much damage to them.

CP14Mannequin.name: mannequin
CP14Mannequin.desc: A handy stand for clothing or armour.

CP14WallmountWoodenBoards.name: wooden boards
CP14WallmountWoodenBoards.desc: Nailed to the wall. Why? I'm not quite sure.

CP14WallmountWeb.name: web
CP14WallmountWeb.desc: Cobwebs clinging to dark corners with tiny spiders in them.

CP14WallmountVines.name: vines
CP14WallmountVines.desc: The timid shoots of weeds trying to climb the wall upward toward the light

CP14BaseWoodDoor.name: wooden door
CP14BaseWoodDoor.desc: Not the most solid construction, but it's better than nothing.

CP14Chasm.name: chasm
CP14Chasm.desc: You can't even see the bottom.

CP14WallmountCrystalBase.name: sparkling quartz
CP14WallmountCrystalBase.desc: bioluminescent quartz crystals that can take on any color - a very handy light source in a deep caves. Unfortunately, the luminous properties are very hard to preserve.

CP14CrystalBase.name: sparkling quartz
CP14CrystalBase.desc: bioluminescent quartz crystals that can take on any color - a very handy light source in a deep caves. Unfortunately, the luminous properties are very hard to preserve.

CP14BaseTree.name: tree
CP14BaseTree.desc: Decades of life and growth, saturating the surrounding nature with fresh air.

CP14BaseBarrel.name: wooden barrel
CP14BaseBarrel.desc: The simplest design for storing liquids.

CP14Bonfire.name: bonfire
CP14Bonfire.desc: A pile of logs stacked together, ready to burst into flames at the slightest spark.

CP14ChairWooden.name: wooden chair
CP14ChairWooden.desc: Made of the most common planks. Simple and effective!

CP14TableWooden.name: wooden table
CP14TableWooden.desc: A simple table made of boards.

CP14WallmountTorch.name: wallmount torch
CP14WallmountTorch.desc: A good, reliable light source. Too bad it doesn't last.

CP14WallmountLamp.name: eternal flame lamp
CP14WallmountLamp.desc: A fragile eternal blue fire as proof of the superiority of magic over nature.

CP14FrameWooden.name: wooden wall frame
CP14FrameWooden.desc: Wooden frame for any wooden wall.

CP14GatherableBloodgrass.name: bloodgrass
CP14GatherableBloodgrass.desc: The dullest and most common plant to be found in the wild is the dark brown grass.

CP14GatherableFlyAgaric.name: fly agaric
CP14GatherableFlyAgaric.desc: This poisonous mushroom can often be found near bodies of water or other wet areas. It is not recommended for consumption.

CP14GatherableChromiumSlime.name: chromium slime
CP14GatherableChromiumSlime.desc: This rare thick substance can be found in a stream of water as if it has a mind of its own. When trying to change the slime itself - the slime changes the reagent it interacts with.

CP14GatherableWildSage.name: wild sage
CP14GatherableWildSage.desc: Root of this ubiquitous medicinal plant not bad at healing physical injuries, and inducing coughing.

CP14GatherableLumiMushroom.name: lumishroom
CP14GatherableLumiMushroom.desc: A faintly luminous mushroom. Often used by alchemists as a means of concentrating solutions.

CP14AlchemyFurnace.name: alchemy furnace
CP14AlchemyFurnace.desc: A furnace fueled by wood, coal, or any other burning material. Handy for heating your alchemical potions.

CP14AlchemyNormalizer.name: solution normalizer
CP14AlchemyNormalizer.desc: An alchemical device that removes fine precipitates from solutions, and stabilizes it for further work

CP14BaseVat.name: big vat
CP14BaseVat.desc: A very large vat for storing huge amounts of liquid. Heavy, uncomfortable to carry.

CP14WoodenChest.name: wooden chest
CP14WoodenChest.desc: A simple wooden chest for easy storage of junk.

CP14BrassChest.name: brass chest
CP14BrassChest.desc: A simple brass chest for easy storage of junk.

CP14CrateCoffin.name: coffin
CP14CrateCoffin.desc: A comfortable and nice looking coffin to comfortably await your resurrection.

CP14IronGrilleBase.name: iron grille
CP14IronGrilleBase.desc: A strong barrier made of iron bars welded together.

CP14IronGrilleGate.name: iron grille gate
CP14IronGrilleGate.desc: Do you have any idea what awaits you behind these gates? It can be either a toilet or a luxurious mansion.

CP14WallStone.name: rock
CP14WallStone.desc: A solid stone natural wall. It has a cave-like coldness to it.

CP14WallStoneSilverOre.desc: A solid stone natural wall. You see the tantalizing particles of silver in it.

CP14WallStoneGoldOre.desc: A solid stone natural wall. You see the tantalizing particles of gold in it.

CP14BaseWall.name: wall
CP14BaseWall.desc: Sturdy enough to cover you from threats or cold winds.

CP14WallCardboard.name: cardboard Wall
CP14WallCardboard.desc: A thin, flimsy wall made of paper and cardboard. Popular in warm countries.

CP14BaseFenceWood.name: wooden fence
CP14BaseFenceWood.desc: Wooden piece of fencing. I hope there is babushka's garden behind it.

CP14BaseFenceWoodSmall.name: small wooden fence
CP14BaseFenceWoodSmall.desc: Wooden piece of small fence. The best protection for the fencing of a private territory!

CP14FenceWoodHighGate.name: wooden fence gate
CP14FenceWoodHighGate.desc: Do you have any idea what awaits you behind these gates? It can be either a toilet or a luxurious mansion.

CP14FenceWoodSmallGate.name: wooden fence gate
CP14FenceWoodSmallGate.desc: Looking at this gate, a familiar image pops up in your head. Where's my piggy?

CP14WindowStoneBrick.name: stone brick window
CP14WindowStoneBrick.desc: A stone brick wall with a glass window in it.

CP14WindowWooden.name: wooden window
CP14WindowWooden.desc: A wooden wall with a glass window in it.
